root_cause: httpClient.js calls incrementRequest() at the start but only calls decrementRequest() on the success path. When res.ok is false, the function throws without decrementing. The catch block also increments _errorCount a second time for the re-thrown error but never decrements _requestCount. Every failed request leaks +1 into _requestCount permanently.
fix: Move decrementRequest() into a finally block so it always runs regardless of success or failure. Remove the duplicate incrementError() from the catch block.
